name: Aceitunas Rellenas - Stuffed Olives
recipeIngredient: 3/4 oz Can Anchovy Fillets, Cut into Small Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the olives and stuff them with the anchovy fillets.
2. Combine all ingredients except parsley in a bowl.
3. Pour the mixture over the olives and marinate overnight.
4. Mix in the parsley half an hour before serving.
5. If stuffing the olives is not desired, add the anchovies to the marinade and pour over the olives instead. These will keep for a week or more if parsley is added just before serving.
